DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS6-L4-10001300-MSSCI6-EXL-LAT-01 • MS Science Grade 6 • Cell Structures and Functions

Tía Lupe's Leaf

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: What does the boy say about the green dots?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Justify three claims using evidence from the dialogue. First, name the work the students are doing and the line that proves it. Second, name what the green dots do for the plant and the line that explains it. Third, name the girl's next step and the line where she commits to it.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  MS-LS1-2  |  MS Science Grade 6: Cell Structures and Functions
